a with rightwards arrow on top equals 2 i with rightwards arrow on top plus 3 j with rightwards arrow on top space d a n space b with rightwards arrow on top equals 4 i with rightwards arrow on top minus j with rightwards arrow on top. space
J i k a space c with rightwards arrow on top equals 3 a with rightwards arrow on top minus 2 b with rightwards arrow on top comma space b e s a r space v e k t o r space c with rightwards arrow on top space a d a l a h...
